headline: What Philip Morris International (PM)'s EU Advocacy and Dividend Reaffirmation Means For Shareholders
summary: In recent days, Philip Morris International highlighted several developments, including regional leadership changes effective August 1, 2026, a reaffirmed quarterly dividend of US$1.47 per share payable July 20, 2026, and public advocacy urging the European Union to treat tobacco like any other legal business ahead of key regulatory reviews. Together with its emphasis on smoke-free products and workplace cognition, these moves underline how Philip Morris International is trying to reshape...

headline: Philip Morris International (PM) Stock After 11.5% YTD Gain Are Valuation Concerns Justified
summary: If you are wondering whether Philip Morris International shares still offer value at around US$178.69, it helps to step back and look at what the recent price action and fundamentals are really saying. The stock is up 11.5% year to date and 0.3% over the past year, even though it has declined 2.9% in the last week and 5.5% over the past month, which may have changed how investors view both its upside and its risks. Recent news flow around Philip Morris International has often centered on its...
